name: milvuscraft
description: Production toolkit for senior engineers building with and on Milvus — 12 specialised skills covering connection, schema design, indexing, search optimisation, multi-tenancy, observability, backup/restore, and diagnostics, wired to the official Milvus MCP server.

milvus_mcp_url.title: Milvus MCP Server URL
